title: (Discontinued) Vigil Ventures
description: Vigil Ventures is a vanilla+ modpack consisting of QoL, Performance and visual mods. -- It is optional and the server can be joined on a vanilla client.
body:
### This project has been put on hiatus _indefinitely_

## VIGIL VENTURES
A QoL, performance, and visual overhaul of Minecraft designed for use in The Vigil's servers.
Created By Nevarro, all rights reserved to the creators of the mods who I humbly thank for giving us what we ourselves crave but can not create.


![Vigil Ventures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ff28559125e6b5d5e5b71bfc2f9ef446f77f6e7.png)

Minecraft has always been a great tool to shape not only a place of your own but memories that you may long forget, if not for how deeply they become ingrained in your builds and worlds. That is the core principle that I hope **Vigil Ventures** will reinforce by providing a lightweight way to return to your worlds - fresh and reinvigorated, without stressing machines nor worrying about save compatibility. So get in there and create some memories worth cementing in your blocks.

### **Features:**

Lightweight visual changes that don't stray too far from the vanilla look of Minecraft, including mods such as:
- 3D Skin Layers
- Blur+
- Cave Dust

As well as resourcepacks/datapacks that add a little bit more life to your game with new animations and new sounds that fill the ambience.
Resource packs were also chosen to give a small tweak to the world including:
- Simple Grass Flowers
- Better Leaves
- Gui Perfected
All of which can be disabled to the preference of the user.

QoL mods are featured such as Journeymap, Vanilla Refresh, Mouse Tweaks and all the essential must-haves for another playthrough.

The FancyMenu addition changes the main menu style to that which represent the creator and his friends, this can be turned off by pressing _CTRL+ALT+C_ and clicking on _Current Screen Customisation: Enabled_, or simply removing the FancyMenu mod once the pack is installed.

There are **NO** mods that add new blocks/item etc. and as such it's should be compatible with all servers and singleplayer saves.

Disclaimer: _This pack was made for release version 1.21 of Minecraft and may or may not cause problems/crashes on other versions._
_Contents of the pack are liable to change as The Vigil's official server gets updated, as with most modpacks some mods will be left behind depending on the need, compatibility, or simply lack of updates._

### System Requirements
- GPU: Integrated Graphics
- CPU: Potato
- RAM: 6GB
- Additional: It should work fine on most modern machines.
